scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @f4fun/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @f4fun/monopoly-engine build && pnpm --filter @f4fun/seven-wonders-engine build && pnpm --filter @f4fun/monopoly-bot build && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --filter @f4fun/server dev" "pnpm --filter @f4fun/web dev"
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @f4fun/shared-types typecheck && pnpm --filter @f4fun/monopoly-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @f4fun/seven-wonders-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @f4fun/monopoly-bot typecheck && pnpm --filter @f4fun/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @f4fun/web typecheck
scripts.prepush: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
